name: Cloudian - Storm Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雲魔物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ストーム・ドラゴン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Cloudian" monster from your GY. Cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card is in face-up Defense Position, destroy it. Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; place 1 Fog Counter on that target.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Cloudian" monster from your GY. Cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card is in face-up Defense Position, destroy it. Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; place 1 Fog Counter on that target.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
